generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure in the AECO domain, specifically a Living Lab case study, represented as a unified virtual model for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations"
]
instance IndoorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring environmental temperature parameters integrated into BIM models for real-time data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring occupancy parameters integrated into BIM models for real-time data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]
instance IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorTemperatureSensor
]
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data streams from environmental sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data streams from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model containing geometric, spatial, and functional building data enriched with BCS component metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTools, EclipseDitto
]
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT connectivity platform for MQTT/AMQP communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService
]
instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for device and twin state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]
instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization engine for interactive building models"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]
instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tools for creating and managing BIM models with geometric and functional data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for building system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]
instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for energy consumption optimization using predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, AdjustHVACAction
]
instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for visual comfort adjustment based on lighting conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]
instance NonVisualHealthEffectManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing non-visual health effects through environmental control"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectManagementInsight, AdjustVentilationAction
]
instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building models using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DVisualizationInsight
]
instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
]
instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adjustments for visual comfort based on real-time data"
]
instance NonVisualHealthEffectManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Management of non-visual health effects through environmental control"
]
instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC systems for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance AdjustVentilationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of ventilation for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of environmental and operational parameters"
]
instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building performance scenarios"
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for system performance"
]
instance Interactive3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building models for facility management"
]
instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators in Building Control Systems for operational adjustment of physical building systems"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]
instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers in Building Control Systems for managing building operations"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT and transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to actuators and controllers for real-time adjustments to building systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and the Digital Twin; no explicit time intervals or specific rates mentioned in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular constellation comprising BIM as semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and service-oriented components with standardized extension points for integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life-cycle stages (design, construction, operation, refurbishment), with the DT primarily representing the 'as operated' phase through real-time data integration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess accuracy, interoperability, and architectural soundness of the DT's representation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto; specific communication protocols not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for integrating with external systems (e.g., other DTs, enterprise systems), ensuring interoperability across AECO domains."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Leverages Building Information Modeling (BIM) as a semantic backbone; specific BIM standards (e.g., IFC) and communication protocols for Eclipse Hono/Ditto are not explicitly detailed in the document."
]
